honest_note: Seed/Default/Performance profiles collapse onto Candidate C and hit their targets dramatically because C is a self-contained, Metal-accelerated, direct-quant runtime. The Development profile (142,812 LOC active owned) exceeds target because it carries the proven multi-arch engine (hawking-core 60k), Python control tooling (51k), and HIDE (6k) whose capability the Seed does not yet replicate. Reducing it to <=35k/50k WITHOUT losing capability is a genuine migration campaign (rewrite each remaining arch/serving/kernel surface as a thin Seed-IR adapter), NOT a one-turn deletion. Deleting proven capability to hit a number is explicitly refused.

capabilities: + Llama adapter + Forge (ternary sub-bit) + Doctor rescue + local CLI
Default.status: PASS (2204 - the Seed IS a self-contained default for the Llama/SmolLM path)

Development.status: OVER (142,812) - includes the full proven multi-model engine + Python control + HIDE; this is the accretion disk still to condense
